currentGoal: Keep the dashboard focused on Luna's identity, one active goal, the most recent completed run, one clear next step, and a few future ideas.
lastCompletedRun: 2026-07-07: Tidied ROADMAP.md so completed early tasks, near-term work, and later possibilities match the current project state.
nextStep: Refresh the Idea Queue with realistic small tasks, or add one gentle beginner-friendly documentation improvement.
futureIdeas: Add one gentle documentation improvement for beginners.
Add a small decision log entry explaining why the next task was chosen.
Add a simple project mood or status history.
decisionLog: A dashboard makes Luna easy to understand at a glance.
Structured project data keeps updates small, safe, and beginner-friendly.
Showing goals, ideas, and decisions first creates a clear trail before adding larger features.
ideaQueue: Add one gentle documentation improvement for beginners.
Add a small decision log entry for the next chosen task.
Add a simple project mood or status history note.

glossary.meaning: A project folder that keeps files and their change history together.
A safe workspace for trying changes without changing the main version right away.
A request to review and bring a set of changes into the project.
To combine approved changes from one branch into another branch.

localSetup: Open a terminal in the Luna project folder.
Start a simple local web server with python3 -m http.server 8000.
Visit http://localhost:8000 in a browser to view the dashboard.
